reviews.review_title: Game of the year Game of the year
reviews.review_description: I think this is the game of the year because it has so much features to it. You can complete tasks play with your friends going to public codes and even play single player and you can do loads of things. There’s the granny‘s house garage Street Butcher and now the mill this game is amazing just like you are I hope this was helpful and I hope you enjoy your reading and make sure you get the game cause it’s so so so so so so worth it. ￼￼

I Am Cat feels less like a passion project and more like a cheaply assembled product designed to capitalize on a viral trend. Beneath the cute premise is a surprisingly shallow experience with limited content, repetitive gameplay, and very little long-term appeal. The novelty of being a cat wears off quickly, leaving behind a game that struggles to justify its price tag.

What makes the experience even more disappointing is the apparent reliance on AI-generated assets. Many players have pointed out AI-generated artwork throughout the game and its promotional material, giving the entire project an artificial, low-effort feel rather than the charm and creativity one would expect from a VR title.

Instead of feeling like a carefully crafted game, I Am Cat often comes across as a collection of trends, shortcuts, and monetization tactics stitched together into a product that lacks identity. The result is a game that feels more interested in attracting attention than delivering a memorable experience.

I regret purchasing it. Save your money and support developers who invest genuine creativity, effort, and originality into their games rather than relying on gimmicks and AI-generated filler. This may look entertaining in short videos, but once the novelty fades, there's very little substance left underneath.

So, I’m a kid looking for a game. BOOM I am cat, it’s amazing, it has a perfect balance of thrills and fun. Multiplayer is great because you can do a private lobby and you share a code for friends to get in, or a public lobby with random people— or cats in this case. They space out the map arrivals, we are waiting for the beach rn, which builds up suspense and excitement, and I’m sure this is a game that people 7+ will enjoy. Bye guys!!!

I am cat is my favourite game of all time. 

It has a fun selection of outfits to choose from and challenges to compete. There are many different maps to grind your way through. 

Although it does cost a lot of money, I still think that it is worth buying. There are multiplayer modes to play with friends or people also playing.

ENJOY PLAYING! :)

reviews.review_title: Great game! This is what you should add!
reviews.review_description: I think that they should let you pick you name and gender (you don't have to,and it should have he she or they if you do want to) so that you can have a cat to have fun with and defeat granny with! you could also have a little baby kitten to take care of, and it would be a lot more fun! You could choose the fur color of your ￼mate and your kin!! you could also choose your mates name and your child’s name! Thank you for understanding and reading, I know this would take a lot of developing so it might not be the best idea, but I think it would make the game way more interactive, and make people buy the game more often.
